hero.title: We care for your pet like family
hero.subtitle: Full-service veterinary clinic in Juan Díaz, Panama

services.title: Our Services
services.clinicDesc: Consultations, diagnostics and treatments for your pet
services.petshopDesc: Food, accessories and products for your pet
services.groomingDesc: Bath, grooming and boarding for your companion
services.funeralDesc: Dignified and respectful farewell service for your pet

about.title: About Us
about.text1: At Veterinaria Vida+ we are dedicated to the comprehensive care of your pet. Our team of professionals has the experience and commitment to provide quality care.
about.text2: Located in Juan Díaz, Ciudad Radial, we are your trusted veterinary clinic with all the services your pet needs under one roof.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.t1: Excellent care for my puppy. The doctor is very kind and professional.
testimonials.t2: Fair prices and the grooming service makes my cat look beautiful.
testimonials.t3: The best veterinary clinic in Juan Díaz. Always attentive and caring with pets.

contact.title: Contact & Location
contact.addressText: Juan Díaz, Ciudad Radial, Radiant Plaza, Local 1 & 2
contact.hoursText: Tuesday to Sunday: 9:00 AM - 5:30 PM | Monday: Closed
